subject: Welcome to Mem0, need any help?
body:
Hi , 
 I'm TJ, the founder of Mem0, and I'd like to personally welcome you. 
 I'd love to know: what are you building? Understanding your use case helps me point you to the right resources (we have guides for Companions, voice agents, personalization, and more). 
 Just hit reply and let me know, happy to help you get set up quickly. 
 Best, 
 Taranjeet
